#   Banana Bread


A moist, sweet loaf.


Source: https://example.com/banana-bread
Tags:   baking,  banana,  dessert
Serves:  8


## Ingredients


- 3 ripe bananas
- 75g melted butter
- 150g sugar
- 1 egg
- 200g flour


## Method


1. Mash the bananas in a bowl.


2. Mix in the melted butter.


3. Add the sugar and egg, then fold in the flour.

4. Pour into a lined loaf tin and bake at 180°C for 55 minutes.


## Notes


Best served warm with butter.
